meta.title: Spliit - split expenses with friends
meta.description: Split trip and group expenses in any currency, see who owes what, and settle up in a tap.

auth.signInWithGoogle: Sign in with Google to accept the invite.

home.tagline: Track group spending, split it fairly, settle up in seconds.
home.ctaNote: Free to use. Sign in with Google to get started.

receipt.label: Receipt scanning
receipt.title: Snap the receipt. Skip the typing.
receipt.body: Point your camera at any receipt and Spliit reads it for you - every line item, the prices, tax and tip, even the currency. Tap who shared each dish and it splits to the exact cent.
points: Reads items, prices, tax, tip and total automatically
Detects the currency from the receipt
Assign each item to the people who shared it
Applies as an exact split - no mental math

features.title: Everything you need to split fairly
features.subtitle: From a two-person dinner to a two-week trip with the whole crew.

items.title: Split any way
items.body: Equally, by exact amounts, percentage, or shares. The math always balances to the cent - and it tells you the moment it doesn't.

items.title: Any currency
items.body: Log an expense in euros, yen, or rupiah. Daily exchange rates are fetched automatically and you can override them anytime.

items.title: Smart settle-up
items.body: See who owes whom at a glance, plus the fewest payments needed to clear every debt. Record a payment and balances zero out.

items.title: Shared groups
items.body: Spin up a group for a trip, flat, or dinner crew. Share one link - everyone joins and sees the same running tab.

steps.title: Up and running in three steps

items.title: Create a group
items.body: Name it, pick a base currency, invite your crew with a link.

items.title: Add or scan expenses
items.body: Type an expense, or snap the receipt and let Spliit do the typing.

items.title: Settle up
items.body: See who owes what and clear it in the fewest payments possible.

install.label: Install on iPhone
install.title: Add Spliit to your home screen
install.body: No App Store needed. Install it from Safari and it opens full-screen with its own icon - just like a native app.

items.title: Tap Share
items.body: Open spliit in Safari, then tap the Share button in the toolbar (the square with an arrow).

items.title: Add to Home Screen
items.body: Scroll the share sheet and choose “Add to Home Screen.”

items.title: Tap Add
items.body: Confirm with “Add.” Spliit lands on your home screen with its own icon.

install.android: On Android, open the browser menu and choose “Install app” or “Add to Home screen.”

finalCta.title: Ready to split fairly?
finalCta.body: Free to use. Create your first group in under a minute.
finalCta.note: Sign in with Google - no card, no spam.

footer.tagline: Splits your bills, not your friendships.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidInput: Please check the form and try again.
errors.notAMember: You are not a member of this group.
errors.payerNotMember: The payer must be a group member.
errors.participantsNotMembers: Everyone in the split must be a group member.
errors.settlementSamePerson: Payer and recipient must be different people.
errors.settlementNotMembers: Both people must be group members.
errors.inviteUsed: This invite has already been used.
errors.inviteWrongEmail: This invite was sent to a different email address.
errors.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero.
errors.splitWeightsPositive: Split weights must add up to a positive number.
errors.splitNeedsParticipant: An expense needs at least one participant.
errors.exactSumMismatch: Exact amounts must add up to the total.
errors.couldNotStartSignIn: Could not start sign-in. Please try again.
errors.assignItemToSomeone: Assign at least one item to someone.
errors.notGroupOwner: Only the group owner can remove members.

dashboard.title: Your groups
dashboard.emptyBody: Create a group for your next trip or shared house to start splitting expenses.

balances.settleCtaBody: See who owes whom and record payments.

invite.invitedYou: {name} invited you to split expenses together.

expenseForm.description: Record what was paid and how to split it.
expenseForm.rateHelp: Auto-filled from daily rates - edit if you used a different one.
expenseForm.enterShareForOne: Enter a share for at least one person.

expenseList.emptyBody: Add your first expense to start tracking who owes what.
expenseList.deleteBody: “{description}” ({amount}) will be removed for everyone. This can't be undone.

createGroup.descriptionPlaceholder: Two weeks, four friends, one budget.
createGroup.currencyHelp: Balances are shown in this currency. Expenses can still be added in any currency.

settleUp.nothingToPay: Nothing to pay back right now.
settleUp.dialogDescription: Log money that changed hands to settle a debt.
settleUp.deleteBody: The payment {from} → {to} ({amount}) will be removed. This can't be undone.

membersPanel.removeBody: {name} will lose access to the group, but their expenses, balances and payments stay. This can't be undone.
membersPanel.inviteDescription: Create a link to share. They sign in with Google to join - the link works for 7 days.
membersPanel.emailHelp: Leave blank and anyone with the link can join. Set an email to lock the link to that one person.

acceptInvite.nameHelp: This is how you'll show up to the group. You can change it later.

receipt.noItemsDetected: No items detected - add them manually below.
receipt.appliedAsExactSplit: Receipt applied as an exact split
receipt.dialogDescription: Snap the receipt - items and currency are read automatically. Tap who shared each one, then apply as an exact split.
receipt.photoHint: A flat, well-lit photo reads best.
receipt.scanningHint: Usually a few seconds. Hang tight.
